sections.text: Each material form is called a prefix. Not every material has every form. Metals typically have ingots, plates, rods, and wires. Gems have gem and lens forms. The material's properties determine which forms exist.

Prefix	Example	Notes
ingot	Steel Ingot	Base metal form
dust	Gold Dust	Macerator output
plate	Iron Plate	Bender or hammer
rod	Bronze Rod	Lathe output
gear	Brass Gear	Machine recipes
wire	Copper Wire	Wiremill output
pipe	Steel Pipe	Fluid transport
nugget	Iron Nugget	1/9 of ingot, 16 mB
